summary.lv: SINTEC UK (Londonas mehāniskā un elektriskā kontraktora — automatizācijas un materiālu apstrādes sistēmas, klienti Amazon, M&S, Ocado, BMW, Nestlé) Latvijas filiāle Rīgā meklē Junior IT Administratoru Microsoft 365 / Azure AD / Intune / SharePoint atbalstam un 1./2. līnijas IT atbalstam.
summary.en: SINTEC UK — London-based mechanical/electrical contractor specialising in material handling automation for Amazon, M&S, Ocado, BMW, Nestlé — is hiring a Junior IT Administrator in its Riga subsidiary to support Microsoft 365, Azure AD, Intune, SharePoint and 1st/2nd-line IT.
